title: Add user principal as hardcoded admin

requirements.text: Add the principal `gyojt-gsv7l-g3oqx-3m7xb-w7cmh-nck6r-so6sn-fc7jp-ymofr-fgq6n-eae` to the hardcoded admin principals list in the backend so that `AccessControl.isAdmin` returns true for this user.
acceptanceCriteria: The principal `gyojt-gsv7l-g3oqx-3m7xb-w7cmh-nck6r-so6sn-fc7jp-ymofr-fgq6n-eae` is included in the hardcoded admin principals array alongside the existing two admin principals.
`AccessControl.isAdmin` returns true when called with this principal.
All previously hardcoded admin principals remain in the list and are not removed.
No other backend logic is changed.

constraints: Preserve all existing hardcoded admin principals: `6vouu-wm3zs-nkf25-drcd4-36xid-4a6ia-tldfs-xjk7v-hs7hi-ykijd-6ae` and `5ib3p-enfoo-cr5qf-yezch-xspls-gvmwu-qbhlx-u63dj-xqh47-slru2-qqe`.
Do not modify any frontend immutable paths.
Do not change any other backend logic, stable storage, or public methods.
nonGoals: Changing the subscription or license status of the user.
Adding dynamic admin management via canister calls.
